panels.title: SOH (est) %
panels.description: SOH ≈ full-charge capacity / rated. Estimated from remaining/SOC — approximate for LTO (flat OCV curve); most reliable near full charge. EOL ~80%.

panels.title: C-rate
panels.description: Charge/discharge current relative to rated capacity (I/C). >0 charge, <0 discharge.

panels.title: UV headroom (mV)
panels.description: Weakest cell voltage minus its under-voltage protection threshold. Thresholds preliminary — tune after baseline.

panels.title: OV headroom (mV)
panels.description: Over-voltage protection threshold minus strongest cell voltage. Thresholds preliminary.

panels.title: Charged (Ah, range)
panels.description: Coulomb-counted charge throughput over the dashboard time range (increase() handles counter resets on restart).

panels.title: Coulombic eff (range) %
panels.description: Discharge Ah / charge Ah over the range. Meaningful over full charge/discharge cycles.

panels.title: Equiv. full cycles (range)
panels.description: Discharge throughput / rated capacity — throughput-based cycle count (independent of the BMS cycle counter).

panels.title: Cumulative Ah (in/out)
panels.description: Raw coulomb counters (reset to 0 on exporter restart — expected).

panels.title: Ah throughput (avg A)
panels.description: rate() of the coulomb counters × 3600 = average current per direction.

panels.title: Cell stddev (mV)
panels.description: Standard deviation of cell voltages — pack inconsistency. Rising trend = growing imbalance/degradation. Thresholds preliminary.

panels.title: Imbalance vs balancing
panels.description: Cell spread (mV, left) and balancer duty cycle over 1h (%, right). Does balancing reduce the spread?

panels.title: Cell deviation from mean (mV) — $battery
panels.description: Per-cell voltage minus pack average. Negative = weak/sagging cell (relative internal resistance / weaker cell).

panels.title: Cell drift from mean (mV) — $battery
panels.description: Deviation over time — a cell that steadily drifts away is aging/weakening.

panels.title: Cell ranking — $battery
panels.description: Cells sorted by voltage (weakest at top).

panels.title: Top-of-charge ranking (mV, ~30d) — $battery
panels.description: Per-cell average deviation from mean while SOC>95%. LTO's flat curve hides weak cells mid-SOC; at top-of-charge the capacity-limited cell fills first and rides highest. Highest value = replace-first candidate (on charge). Window is a subquery lookback, not the dashboard range.

panels.title: Discharge-knee ranking (mV, ~90d) — $battery
panels.description: Per-cell average deviation while SOC<40%. The capacity-limited cell falls off the plateau first near the bottom → most-negative value = replace-first candidate (on discharge). Likely EMPTY until the pack is discharged deeply (it currently floats high) — run a controlled deep discharge to populate.

panels.title: Deviation & load (IR proxy) — $battery
panels.description: Per-cell deviation (mV, left) with pack current (A, right). A cell whose negative deviation deepens as |current| rises has higher internal resistance. For LTO, IR is a SECONDARY signal (decoupled from capacity) — the capacity-limited cell (tables above) takes priority for replacement.

panels.title: Avg SOC (7d) — float level — $battery
panels.description: LTO ages fastest at high SOC (≈95%+ storage markedly accelerates capacity fade). A high 7-day average float is a red flag — lower the charge ceiling / don't hold at 100%. This also makes weak cells easier to spot at mid-SOC.

panels.title: Energy per hour (Wh) — received (+) / spent (−)
panels.description: Energy per hour integrated from measured power (V×I): received = charge (green, up), spent = discharge (orange, down). Bar = increase() of the restart-persisted Wh counter over each hour. Window pinned to the last 2 days so buckets stay hourly regardless of the dashboard range. Legend 'sum' = total over the window.

panels.title: Energy per day (Wh) — received (+) / spent (−)
panels.description: Energy per day integrated from measured power (V×I): received = charge (green, up), spent = discharge (orange, down). Bar = increase() of the restart-persisted Wh counter over each day. Window pinned to the last 30 days so buckets stay daily regardless of the dashboard range. Legend 'sum' = total over the window.
